name: Port / Maritime Terminal Disruption
description: Attack tree modelling cyber attacks against a port or maritime container terminal targeting Terminal Operating Systems (TOS), crane control, vessel traffic, and customs/logistics systems
root_objective: Disrupt port terminal operations to halt cargo movement and cause economic damage

nodes.title: Disrupt Port Terminal Operations
nodes.description: Compromise port and maritime terminal systems to halt container handling, disrupt vessel traffic, or manipulate cargo records

nodes.title: Compromise Terminal Operating System (TOS)
nodes.description: Attack the central TOS that manages container tracking, berth allocation, and crane scheduling

nodes.title: Ransomware on TOS Servers
nodes.description: Deploy ransomware targeting the TOS database and application servers to halt all container operations

nodes.title: Manipulate Container Records
nodes.description: Alter container tracking data (location, contents, weight) to cause misrouting, smuggling, or safety incidents

nodes.title: Attack Crane Control Systems
nodes.description: Compromise automated or semi-automated container crane controls

nodes.title: Disable Ship-to-Shore Crane PLCs
nodes.description: Halt gantry crane operations by crashing or locking the crane control PLCs

nodes.title: Manipulate Automated Guided Vehicles
nodes.description: Compromise AGV navigation systems to cause collisions, route loops, or stop all yard transport

nodes.title: Disrupt Vessel Traffic Services (VTS)
nodes.description: Attack the port's vessel traffic management to create navigational hazards

nodes.title: Spoof Port AIS Data
nodes.description: Inject false AIS signals to misrepresent vessel positions in the port approach channel

nodes.title: Compromise Port Management Information System
nodes.description: Attack the PMIS to alter berth allocations, pilot schedules, and tidal window calculations

nodes.title: Attack Customs and Logistics Chain
nodes.description: Compromise customs declaration, gate access, or intermodal logistics systems

nodes.title: Alter Customs Manifest Data
nodes.description: Modify electronic customs declarations to bypass inspections or smuggle prohibited cargo

nodes.title: Disrupt Gate Automation
nodes.description: Compromise the automated gate system controlling truck entry/exit to create massive queues and delays
